name: Asklepios
description: Asklepios est un compagnon médical permettant au patient de communiquer ses informations médicales à son médecin pour l'optimisation thérapeutique de ses maladies.

# Asklepios Group
![](https://www.asklepios.com/_next/image?url=%2Fapi%2Fimage%3ForiginalSource%3D%252F.imaging%252Ffocalpoint%252F9x4%252Fdam%252Fjcr%253Aaea1e7f3-2b0c-49ce-8d01-24051914b68d%252Fasklepios-kliniken-konzern-start_.jpg&w=1920&q=75)
## We are here for you. 24 hours a day. 365 days a year.
* [Find location](https://www.asklepios.com/en/group/locations)
* [About us](https://www.asklepios.com/en/group/about-us)
* [Find job](https://www.asklepios.com/en/group/career)
* [Financial information](https://www.asklepios.com/en/group/investor-relations)
As a leading private operator of hospitals and healthcare facilities in Germany, Asklepios provides top-class care to medical patients. With 70,000 employees, we put all our energy and experience into the medical quality of our treatment — for the benefit of our patients.

Discover exciting job opportunities at Asklepios in Germany – from apprenticeships to senior management roles. Learn about our modern, supportive work environment and find helpful guidance for international applicants to prepare your application. Be part of future healthcare!
